instruction:
For each trigonometric expression in the lefthand column, choose the expression from the righthand column that completes a fundamental identity. Enter the appropriate letter (A,B,C,D, or E) in each blank.
$\begin{array}{ccccccccccccccccccc}\hline & [ANS] 1.1-\cos^2 (x) 1-\cos^2 (x) [ANS] 2.\cot(x) \cot(x) [ANS] 3.\sec^2 (x) \sec^2 (x) [ANS] 4.1 1 [ANS] 5.\tan(x) \tan(x) & [ANS] & 1. & 1-\cos^2 (x) & [ANS] & 2. & \cot(x) & [ANS] & 3. & \sec^2 (x) & [ANS] & 4. & 1 & [ANS] & 5. & \tan(x) & & A. \sin^2 (x) B. \tan^2 (x)+1 C. \frac{\sin (x)}{\cos (x)} D. \sin^2 (x)+\cos^2 (x) E.  \frac{\cos (x)}{\sin(x)} \\\hline [ANS] & 1. & 1-\cos^2 (x) \\\hline [ANS] & 2. & \cot(x) \\\hline [ANS] & 3. & \sec^2 (x) \\\hline [ANS] & 4. & 1 \\\hline [ANS] & 5. & \tan(x) \\\hline\end{array}$
